mapper.sql: id, transaction_no, order_id, order_no, member_id, member_name, amount, transaction_type, pay_type, pay_no, status, remark, transaction_time, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM transaction ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transaction (transaction_no, order_id, order_no, member_id, member_name, amount, transaction_type, pay_type, pay_no, status, remark, transaction_time, create_time) VALUES (#{transactionNo}, #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{memberId}, #{memberName}, #{amount}, #{transactionType}, #{payType}, #{payNo}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{transactionTime}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE transaction SET transaction_no=#{transactionNo}, amount=#{amount}, transaction_type=#{transactionType}, pay_type=#{payType}, pay_no=#{payNo}, status=#{status}, remark=#{remark} WHERE id=#{id}
